title: MoQ: Not Another Tech Demo
speaker: Luke Curley
description: Update on the state of MoQ beyond demos, into real applications.

title: MOQ vs. WebRTC: a Cloudflare panel discussion
speaker: Renan Dincer, Mike English, Nils Ohlmeier
description: Cloudflare engineers discuss the trade-offs between MoQ and WebRTC, with use cases for each.

title: A QUIC update on MoQ and WebTransport
speaker: Will Law
description: Status update on MoQ and WebTransport from a long-time contributor at Akamai.

title: Replacing WebRTC with Media over QUIC
speaker: Luke Curley
description: Why MoQ aims to replace WebRTC, RTMP/SRT, and HLS/DASH using WebTransport and WebCodecs.

title: DASH and Media-over-QUIC Transport face-off
speaker: Ali C. Begen
description: Quantitative performance comparison between Low-Latency DASH and MoQ Transport.

title: Media over QUIC contribution with Rust
speaker: Mike English
description: Practical experience implementing the MoQ protocols in Rust for broadcast-scale ultra-low latency streaming.

title: Cacheable live under 200ms glass to glass: It is MoQ
speaker: Jordi Cenzano
description: An end-to-end MoQ proof of concept built with WebCodecs, WebTransport, and quic-go showing sub-200ms latency.

title: Low-Latency Video over QUIC
speaker: Luke Curley
description: Foundational early talk on low-latency video over QUIC by the creator of moq.dev.
